final_prompt.prompt:
Create an infographic explaining the definitions of and relationships between multiple AI-related concepts, in a hand-drawn illustration style, visually rich and easy to understand.

Style/medium: hand-drawn sketch infographic, pen-and-ink with light watercolor fills, whiteboard explainer aesthetic, reminiscent of RSA Animate or sketchnote visual thinking
Composition: multi-panel layout with each concept in its own labeled node, connected by annotated arrows showing relationships, balanced across the canvas with generous whitespace
Subject: seven interconnected concepts — AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, CLI — each node contains a short definition label and a small illustrative doodle icon
Scene/backdrop: clean off-white paper texture background, no photographic environment
Lighting/mood: flat even lighting appropriate for a diagram, friendly and approachable tone
Color palette: warm off-white base, each concept node accented with a distinct pastel highlight (soft blue, green, yellow, orange, pink, purple, teal), black ink for text and lines
Materials/textures: visible pencil sketch lines, slight paper grain, hand-lettered annotation style
Text (verbatim): "AI" / "MCP" / "AI Agent" / "OpenClaw" / "AI Skill" / "蒸馏" / "CLI"
Constraints: all seven concept labels must be legible; relationship arrows must be annotated with brief connector phrases; layout must work as a single flat image; no 3D perspective distortion
Avoid: corporate slide deck aesthetic, generic clipart icons, overcrowded illegible text, photorealistic rendering, dark background
